subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be the glory of My Kingdom and My Dominion, and the glory of them that dwell in the heavens and on earth. We make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهاء ملکوتی و جبروتی و بهاء من فی السموات و الارضین انا ذکرناک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
